name: Roasted Red Pepper Cream (Jurassic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the roasted red peppers and place them in a blender.
2. Heat olive oil in a small skillet over low heat.
3. Add onion and garlic to the skillet and sauté until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
4. Scrape the contents of the skillet into the blender.
5. Add tomato paste, balsamic vinegar, cayenne pepper, and sugar to the blender.
6. Blend until a smooth puree forms.
7. Add sour cream to the blender and blend until fully combined.
8. Season the puree with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Makes 3/4 cup (12 tablespoons).
